testcase.name: test_reading_career_valid
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:114: in test_reading_career_valid assert r.status_code == 200, f"Unexpected status: {r.status_code} body={r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 body={"detail":"Astro engine unavailable: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reading_each_focus_area[love]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:130: in test_reading_each_focus_area assert r.status_code == 200, f"focus={focus} status={r.status_code} body={r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: focus=love status=502 body={"detail":"Astro engine unavailable: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
